system-instructions.mission: Agent mode commands are not available in this version. Use Ask mode for codebase questions or Plan mode to preview workflows.

objectives.objective: Agent mode is disabled in this version
Use Ask mode for codebase analysis and Q&A
Use Plan mode to generate DAG specifications

system-instructions.guidance:
Agent mode commands (create-agent, create-dag, run-dag) require the cloud version.
For the extension version: - Use **Ask mode** to analyze your codebase and get recommendations - Use **Plan mode** to generate DAG specifications
To execute commands, use the cloud version or CLI tools directly.
